title: Chunk
description: Standard chunk record produced by any retrieval module's ingestion pipeline. All three retrieval methods (vector, keyword, CLaRa) index documents using this schema. Derived from vector_retrieval/src/utils/chunker.py.

document_id.description: Unique identifier for the source document. Format: 'doc-<NNN>' (zero-padded). Example: 'doc-001'.

document_title.description: Human-readable document title. Derived from filename (underscores/hyphens replaced with spaces, title-cased).

source.description: Original filename of the source document.

chunk_index.description: Zero-based position of this chunk within its source document.

start_word_index.description: Word index in the source document where this chunk begins.

end_word_index.description: Word index in the source document where this chunk ends (exclusive).

word_count.description: Number of words in this chunk.

overlap.description: Number of words shared with the adjacent chunk (chunking parameter).

text.description: Full text content of the chunk.

metadata.description: File-level metadata extracted at ingestion time.

file_size_kb.description: File size in kilobytes, rounded to 2 decimal places.

uploaded_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the document was loaded.

example.text: The RAG system is intended to support domain-specific question answering...
